releases.title: Update Flow QA Test
highlights: QA test release to verify the full update flow works end-to-end.

releases.title: Update UX Improvements
highlights: Update check now shows target version and number of commits behind.
Confirm dialog displays current and target versions before applying.
Progress indicator shows human-readable step descriptions.
Success message shows new version with 5-second restart countdown.
Failure message includes rollback details and error information.

releases.title: Bug Fixes & Polish
highlights: Fixed persistent red notification badge on settings gear icon.
Settings gear badge now auto-dismisses after version is seen.
Update check clears stale badges on up-to-date status.

releases.title: Safe In-Portal Update Mechanism
highlights: One-click updates from settings — check for and apply portal updates without leaving the browser.
11-step safe update with rollback — stash, pull, verify, restart with automatic rollback on failure.
Auto-check every 24 hours — portal silently checks for new versions and shows a notification badge.
Fast-forward only pulls — refuses force-pushes and non-linear history to protect local changes.
Watchdog-aware restart — coordinates with the portal watchdog for zero-downtime restarts.

releases.title: Custom Overlay Architecture & Reliability Upgrades
highlights: Custom Overlay Architecture — add panels, API routes, and config overrides without editing core portal files. Customizations survive upstream updates.
Skills Shop Panel Support — new custom panel system with runtime HTML injection. Drop self-contained HTML files into custom/panels/.
Config Override System — custom/config.json overrides portal globals (e.g., MAX_TOKENS for 1M context window).
Custom API Routes — custom/routes.py adds endpoints under the /api/custom/ namespace.
Template Files — .template files included as starting points for all customization types.
Bidirectional Telegram Bridge — Telegram messages now inject into the Claude session and stream responses back (previously one-way only).
Portal Watchdog — automatic restart on crash detection with health checks every 30 seconds.
Context Bar Fix — now correctly shows usage against the 1M token window (was showing against 200K).
Files Panel Fix — directory listing now works correctly with the backend API format.
File Download Auth Fix — downloads now properly authenticate via query parameter tokens.
68-test Suite Merged — comprehensive test coverage for API auth, database integrity, and frontend structure.
switchPanel Hook — custom panels integrate seamlessly with the existing panel switching system.

releases.title: Aether Portal — Full Codebase Drop
highlights: Complete portal rewrite by Aether (Jared Sanborn)
Admin clients dashboard (admin-clients.html)
Admin referrals management (admin-referrals.html)
Affiliate portal (affiliate-portal.html)
Agent lifecycle hooks system
SQLite-backed referral and agent databases
Release notes in settings
